channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: International fiesta fills New Mexico's sky with colorful hot air balloons
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE, N.M. (AP) — One of the most photographed events in the world is set to kick off Saturday with a mass ascension of color for the 52nd annual Albuquerque International Balloon Fiesta.
item.dc:creator: SUSAN MONTOYA BRYAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: A Texas execution is renewing calls for clemency. It's rarely granted
item.description: Texas rarely grants clemency for death row inmates, but that's not stopping a group of bipartisan lawmakers from showing their support for a man scheduled to be executed in October.
item.dc:creator: Nadia Lathan And Summer Ballentine, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Well-known Asheville music tradition returns in a sign of hopefulness after Helene
item.description: A well-known Asheville musical tradition has returned in a sign of hopefulness a week after Helene battered the mountain city.
item.dc:creator: Brittany Peterson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Judge denies an order sought by a Black student who was punished over his hair
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — A federal judge on Friday denied a request by a Black high school student in Texas for a court order that the student’s lawyers say would have allowed him to return to his high school without fear of having his previous punishment over his hairstyle resume.
item.dc:creator: JUAN A. LOZANO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man charged with helping Idaho inmate escape during a hospital ambush sentenced to life in prison
item.description: An Idaho man who prosecutors said ambushed and shot correctional officers at a Boise hospital in a plot to help a fellow white supremacist gang member escape from prison was sentenced to life behind bars.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Boone, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Ohio woman's viral TikTok videos lead prompt search for body in her yard
item.description: Police in Columbus, Ohio have concluded an investigation after a woman posted on TikTok that she might have discovered a body buried in her yard.
item.dc:creator: Katie Millard, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Federal authorities issue warning ahead of Oct. 7 attacks anniversary
item.description: The FBI and Department of Homeland Security issued a warning ahead of the one-year-anniversary next week of the Hamas attacks on Israel.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: McDonald's adding Chicken Big Mac to menus for a limited time
item.description: The sandwich is essentially built the same way as the Big Mac, albeit with two "tempura-battered chicken patties"
item.dc:creator: Nick Gladney, NewsNation

item.title: North Carolina is distributing Benadryl and EpiPens as yellow jackets swarm from Helene flooding
item.description: Deadly flooding from Hurricane Helene in western North Carolina has also disrupted the underground nests of yellow jackets, bees and other insects, causing them to swarm and sting people struggling to recover from the storm.
item.dc:creator: DEVI SHASTRI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Oklahoma defends Bibles-in-schools proposal after report that only Trump's might qualify
item.description: Oklahoma Education Superintendent Ryan Walters’s (R) office is defending the process for how the state will be selecting newly mandated Bibles in classrooms after a report was released that the criteria is so narrow that essentially no Bibles qualify — besides ones endorsed by former President Trump
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KRON4

item.title: Biden: 'I don't know' if Netanyahu trying to influence election
item.description: President Biden on Friday said he wasn't aware of whether Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu was trying to influence the U.S. election, while noting no administration has been a stronger ally to Israel than his own.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Tennessee agencies warn against Helene recovery scams
item.description: Several state and federal agencies have issued warnings about Helene recovery scams and have given advice on how to avoid becoming a victim yourself.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Barker, NewsNation

item.title: TSA detects shotgun shell containing meth hidden in traveler's groin area at Pennsylvania airport
item.description: A traveler attempting to hide a prohibited substance inside a prohibited item — and then tucking them into his groin area — was quickly caught by TSA officers this week.
item.dc:creator: Hayden Sherry, ABC 4

item.title: Boris Johnson: Netanyahu may have bugged my bathroom
item.description: Former United Kingdom Prime Minister Boris Johnson alleged in an interview with The Telegraph that his staff found a “listening device” in his personal bathroom after Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu had used it in 2017.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Springsteen calls Trump 'most dangerous candidate for president in my lifetime,' backs Harris
item.description: The rock legend said the former president “doesn’t understand the meaning of this country, its history or what it means to be deeply American.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, KTLA 5

item.title: Oregon woman gets probation after freezing puppies to feed snake, gets to keep pets
item.description: An Oregon woman was sentenced on Wednesday on several animal abuse charges after authorities learned she froze several litters of puppies to feed her pet snakes.
item.dc:creator: Michaela Bourgeois, Fox 5

item.title: Man accused of trying to carjack pregnant woman in Connecticut drive-thru
item.description: With their help, police were able to arrest the suspect, who police say is facing a multitude of charges in this case and others.
item.dc:creator: Bailey Wright, NewsNation

item.title: Dockworkers' union to suspend strike until Jan. 15
item.description: The union representing 45,000 striking U.S. dockworkers at East and Gulf coast ports reached a deal Thursday to suspend a three-day strike until Jan. 15 to provide time to negotiate a new contract.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Subway rider shot in the head by police files claim accusing officers of recklessly opening fire
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A lawyer for a New York City subway rider who was inadvertently shot in the head by police at a station has filed a legal claim against the city, accusing the officers of showing “carelessness and reckless” disregard for the lives of others when they opened fire on a man holding
item.dc:creator: CEDAR ATTANASIO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Twin babies who died alongside their mother are youngest-known Helene victims
item.description: A large tree had crashed through the roof, crushing Kobe Williams and causing her to fall on top of infant sons Khyzier and Khazmir. All three were found dead.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 3 officers convicted in Tyre Nichols fatal beating, 2 acquitted of civil rights charges
item.description: Three former Memphis officers were convicted Thursday of charges of witness tampering in the 2023 fatal beating of Tyre Nichols, and two were acquitted of federal civil rights violations in a death that sparked national protests and calls for broad changes in policing.
item.dc:creator: Megan Fayard, KRON4

item.title: Former Colorado county clerk Tina Peters sentenced to 9 years for voting data scheme
item.description: A judge ripped into a Colorado county clerk for her crimes and lies before sentencing her Thursday to nine years behind bars for a data-breach scheme spawned from the rampant false claims about voting machine fraud in the 2020 presidential race.
item.dc:creator: MEAD GRUVER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Motorized wheelchair stuffed with cocaine seized at Bush airport, CBP said
item.description: EL PASO, Texas (Border Report) -- Unusually large cushions on a motorized wheelchair piqued the interest of officers at George Bush Intercontinental Airport last month in Houston, U.S. Customs and Border Protection said. Their suspicions were right.
item.dc:creator: Fernie Ortiz, Fox 5

item.title: Los Angeles D.A. to ‘reevaluate’ Menendez brothers’ convictions
item.description: Los Angeles County District Attorney George Gascón provided an update Thursday on the convictions of Erik and Lyle Menendez, who were convicted of killing their parents in August 1989.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KRON4

item.title: Country music star Garth Brooks sued for rape, sexual assault
item.description: LOS ANGELES - Garth Brooks, one of the biggest stars in country music history, has been named in a lawsuit accusing him of raping a hair and makeup artist he employed in 2019.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Twin babies who died alongside their mother in Georgia are youngest-known Hurricane Helene victims
item.description: Georgia father Obie Lee Williams spent every morning looking forward to a daily phone call from his daughter.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Las Vegas casino implosion show will include 150 'Pyrodrones' 400 feet above the Tropicana
item.description: Las Vegas tourists should not run in fear as 150 “Pyrdrones” shoot sparks 400 feet above the Tropicana demolition site next week—because it’s all part of the show.
item.dc:creator: James Schaeffer, Fox 5

item.title: Study says sleeping in on weekends lowers your heart disease risk by 20%
item.description: The next time someone tries to rib you about your noon alarm on Saturday, kindly inform them that it’s good for the heart.
item.dc:creator: Jordan C. Woika, Fox 5

item.title: Biden student loan forgiveness plan gets win in Georgia court
item.description: President Joe Biden’s student debt relief plan was dealt a win by a Georgia judge this week by removing one Republican challenger and letting the program advance for now after a temporarily restraining order expires.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, WGN 9

item.title: How Black leaders in New York are grappling with Eric Adams and representation
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It wasn’t a shock to many Black New Yorkers that Mayor Eric Adams has surrounded himself with African American civil rights leaders, clergy and grassroots activists since his indictment last week on federal bribery charges.
item.dc:creator: AARON MORRISON and MATT BROWN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Melania Trump: ‘We are dealing with much more danger’
item.description: The former first lady said Wednesday that she thinks Americans need to listen to one another, even if they hold different beliefs.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: Woman recounts her rescue from river, husband's death
item.description: WASHINGTON COUNTY, Tenn. (WJHL) — Some of the best years of Vicki Hunter's life came to a tragic end Friday after a raging Nolichucky River ripped through the bottomland where she and her husband, Jerry, lived with more than a dozen horses.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Keeling, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Florida communities hit three times by hurricanes grapple with how and whether to rebuild
item.description: HORSESHOE BEACH, Fla. (AP) — It was just a month ago that Brooke Hiers left the state-issued emergency trailer where her family had lived since Hurricane Idalia slammed into her Gulf Coast fishing village of Horseshoe Beach in August 2023.
item.dc:creator: KATE PAYNE and DAVID R. MARTIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Last pandemic-era student loan benefit ends even as borrowers struggle to make payments
item.description: The last of the pandemic-era student loan benefits are gone, winding down four years of additional help to borrowers that advocates say was never actually enough.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, Fox 5

item.title: Pilot flying Helene rescue missions in NC ordered out, threatened with arrest
item.description: The fire official told him to tell any other pilots he knew they would also be arrested if they came back.
item.dc:creator: Jody Barr, Fox 5

item.title: Pennsylvania Republican in key swing-state Senate race backs using military to fight fentanyl
item.description: STEELTON, Pa. (AP) — The Republican challenger trying to flip the U.S. Senate seat in swing-state Pennsylvania said he’ll press for U.S.
item.dc:creator: MARC LEVY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Sean 'Diddy' Combs accused of sexual misconduct by 120 people, attorney says
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — An attorney said Tuesday he is representing 120 accusers who have come forward with sexual misconduct allegations against Sean “Diddy” Combs, the hip-hop mogul who is awaiting trial on sex trafficking charges.
item.dc:creator: JUAN A. LOZANO, Associated Press, WGN 9
